Interface Character

All Known Implementing Classes:
Enemy, Hero
public sealed interface Character permits Hero, Enemy
Interface representing a character in the game (Hero or Enemy). It defines the common behavior for any entity that has health (PV), protection, and a level.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    addProtection(int amount)
    Adds protection (shield) to the character.
    default boolean
    isAlive()
    Checks if the character is alive.
    int
    level()
    Returns the current level of the character.
    int
    maxPv()
    Returns the maximum health points the character can have.
    static String
    progressBar(int current, int max)
    Creates a string representing a visual progress bar.
    int
    protection()
    Returns the current protection (armor) value.
    int
    pv()
    Returns the current health points (PV) of the character.
    default void
    removeProtection(int amount)
    Removes protection from the character.
    void
    setProtection(int protection)
    Sets the protection value.
    void
    setPv(int pv)
    Sets the health points of the character.
    default void
    takeDamage(int damage)
    Makes the character take damage.

  • Method Details

    • pv

      int pv()
      Returns the current health points (PV) of the character.
      Returns:
      the current PV.

    • setPv

      void setPv(int pv)
      Sets the health points of the character.
      Parameters:
      pv - the new amount of PV.

    • protection

      int protection()
      Returns the current protection (armor) value. Protection absorbs damage before health is reduced.
      Returns:
      the protection value.

    • setProtection

      void setProtection(int protection)
      Sets the protection value.
      Parameters:
      protection - the new protection value.

    • level

      int level()
      Returns the current level of the character.
      Returns:
      the level.

    • maxPv

      int maxPv()
      Returns the maximum health points the character can have.
      Returns:
      the max PV.

    • takeDamage

      default void takeDamage(int damage)
      Makes the character take damage. The logic is: 1. Damage is applied to protection first. 2. Remaining damage is applied to health (PV). * @param damage the amount of damage to take.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if damage is negative.

    • addProtection

      default void addProtection(int amount)
      Adds protection (shield) to the character.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of protection to add.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if amount is negative.

    • removeProtection

      default void removeProtection(int amount)
      Removes protection from the character. The protection cannot go below zero.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount to remove.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if amount is negative.

    • isAlive

      default boolean isAlive()
      Checks if the character is alive.
      Returns:
      true if pv > 0, false otherwise.

    • progressBar

      static String progressBar(int current, int max)
      Creates a string representing a visual progress bar. Useful for displaying health or XP in the terminal. * @param current the current value (e.g., current HP).
      Parameters:
      max - the maximum value (e.g., max HP).
      Returns:
      a String representing the bar (e.g., "[████░░] 60 / 100").
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if current or max are negative.
